[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2014-01-24
[TITLE]: Burned bodies of rebels discovered in Syria | UK | News | Express.co.uk
[METADATA/INTRO]: WARNING - GRAPHIC CONTENT: Burned bodies of rebels discovered in Syria SHOCKING new photos emerged today showing a pile of burned bodies believed to be Syrian rebels executed by government forces....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: WARNING - GRAPHIC CONTENT: Burned bodies of rebels discovered in Syria 
 SHOCKING new photos emerged today showing a pile of burned bodies believed to be Syrian rebels executed by government forces. 
 The bodies were found north of Damascus 
 The Syrian Arab News Agency took the photos near the city of Sidnaia, north of the capital Damascus. 
 The slaughter is the latest atrocity in the increasingly bloody conflict, in which an estimated 130,000 people have lost their lives, and nearly 10m people have been displaced. 
 The discovery came as Syrian Foreign Minister Walid Muallem threatened to walk out of peace talks in Geneva just hours after they began.
